label: Analytics + Accessibility + Testing/CI + Monetization
topWin: 65-test suite + CI quality gate shipped in one session — codebase now has machine-enforced quality before every deploy.
topGap: Speedrun leaderboard still sorts by score (wrong — should be time ascending); Speedrun/Gauntlet have 0 achievements.
ignisNote: Four failing audit categories addressed in one session by scoping each to its minimum viable improvement rather than over-engineering any single area.
